features.name: signal named 'int' conflicts with C type
features.description: Code should include a Verilog signal declaration using a C reserved keyword name (e.g., 'int', 'char', 'long') which conflicts with the C native type when compiled via MSVC

features.name: deep hierarchy signal names with __DOT__ exceed MSVC limit
features.description: Code should include deeply nested signal hierarchies that produce very long member names with __DOT__ separators, exceeding MSVC's identifier length limit and causing 'undeclared identifier' errors
